negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_5fcae1c8-318a-4561-8ea9-b36a54f175ba
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, as it drives down a residential street. The street is lined with parked cars on both sides, featuring a mix of sedans and SUVs. On the left side, there are modern houses with light-colored siding, while the right side showcases older-style homes with pitched roofs and varied exterior colors. Tall palm trees are scattered between the houses, adding a tropical feel to the neighborhood. The sky is clear and bright, indicating a sunny day. The scene is calm and typical of a suburban area. As the video progresses, the car continues its steady drive down the street. A silver sedan ahead stops to wait for a black sedan in front that is performing a parallel parking. The ego vehicle slows down and stops, waiting behind the silver sedan. The parked cars remain stationary, with no noticeable movement or changes in their positions. The houses and palm trees also stay static, maintaining the tranquil suburban setting. The blue car and the motorcycle leaning against it on the right side of the street remain unchanged throughout the frames. The scene remains consistent, emphasizing the calm and unchanging nature of the neighborhood.  A steady, forward-moving shot from the perspective of the dashboard camera captures the serene suburban street, highlighting the parked vehicles and the mix of architectural styles. The palm trees sway gently in the breeze, adding a dynamic element to the otherwise still scene. The camera angle provides a clear view of the road ahead, showcasing the orderly arrangement of the parked cars and the quiet, peaceful atmosphere of the neighborhood.
